overview.productivity.title: Productivity

overview.revenue.rate_hint: Hours only count towards revenue when they are billable and booked on a project with an hourly rate.
leave.title: Leave
leave.form.override_hint: Recorded against your name. Use it only when the schedule cannot express what was agreed.
leave.schedule.copy_to_others: Copy to the other working days
leave.balance.none: No leave balance yet — an administrator sets entitlements under Settings → Leave.
leave.requests.heading: My requests
leave.requests.cancel_confirm: Cancel this leave request? The hours return to the balance.
leave.team.title: Team leave
auth.local_login_disabled: Password login is disabled. Sign in with your organization account.
auth.unknown_host: This address does not belong to any organization on this installation. Check the URL, or ask your administrator.
auth.org_suspended: This organization is suspended. Contact your administrator.

dashboard.my_day.title: My Day
dashboard.my_day.no_tasks: No open tasks. Enjoy your day!
dashboard.open_by_group.title: Open tasks per project / client
dashboard.open_by_group.empty: No open tasks. All caught up!
dashboard.customize.title: Customize dashboard
dashboard.customize.hint: Choose which widgets you see and in which order. Managers can also save the layout as the team default.
dashboard.customize.hint_dnd: Tick widgets on or off here; drag the tiles themselves to rearrange. Managers set the team default under Settings → Dashboard.
dashboard.team_month.title: Team this month
companies.title: Clients
companies.name: Name
companies.empty_hint: Create your first client to get started.
companies.confirm_delete: Delete this client? This cannot be undone.
companies.status_hint: Switching to a status with a task template automatically creates its tasks.
contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.name: Name
contacts.empty_hint: Add your first contact to get started.
contacts.panel.title: Contacts
contacts.link_client_hint: You can attach this person to a client afterwards.
tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty_hint: Create your first task to get started.
tasks.delete_confirm: Delete this task? This cannot be undone.
tasks.field.title: Title
tasks.panel.title: Tasks
tasks.detail.delete_confirm: Delete this task, including its checklists and comments? This cannot be undone.
tasks.checklist.title: Checklists
tasks.checklist.delete_confirm: Delete this checklist and all its items?
tasks.comments.title: Comments
tasks.comments.delete_confirm: Delete this comment? This cannot be undone.
tasks.activity.title: Activity
tasks.activity.recurrence_spawned: created this task from a recurring task
tasks.activity.template_applied: created this task from a template
tasks.recurrence.title: Repeat
tasks.recurrence.hint: After completion: the next task is created when you complete this one. On schedule: it is created automatically on the interval, even if this one is still open.
tasks.links.title: Links & attachments
tasks.links.empty: No links yet — attach briefs, docs or designs.
tasks.links.files_hint: File and image uploads arrive once file storage is set up; until then, link to your drive.
tasks.detail.due_reason_body: Moving the deadline from {from} to {to} — why?
tasks.detail.due_reason_hint: Extending a deadline asks for a reason and is logged.
tasks.templates.name: Name
tasks.templates.empty_hint: Create a template like “Client onboarding” and it can auto-create tasks when a client reaches a status.
tasks.templates.delete_confirm: Delete this template? Existing tasks are kept.
tasks.checklist.save_template_hint: Save this checklist to the shared template repository
tasks.checklist_templates.title: Checklist templates
tasks.checklist_templates.subtitle: Reusable checklists everyone can attach to a task.
tasks.checklist_templates.empty: No checklist templates yet — save one from a task or create one here.
tasks.checklist_templates.delete_confirm: Delete this checklist template? Checklists already on tasks are kept.

projects.empty_hint: Create a project to plan work, budgets and to-dos for a client.

projects.logged_hint: Logged hours and billable value are shown once time tracking links to projects.

time.timer.heading: Timer
time.timesheet.heading: Weekly timesheet
time.manual.heading: Add time
time.quick_create.company_hint: Created as an active client; details can be filled in later on the client page.
time.approved_locked_hint: Approved hours are locked — ask a manager to change them.
time.overview.title: Hours overview
time.overview.subtitle: Review, approve and invoice the team's hours.
time.delete_confirm: Delete this registration? This cannot be undone.
time.view.label: View
time.day_empty_hint: Add a registration to this day using the panel.
time.panel.title: Time
time.panel.empty: No hours logged in this period yet.
customfields.errors.invalid_datetime: Enter a valid date and time.
customfields.errors.pattern_mismatch: This value has an invalid format.
customfields.errors.out_of_range: This value is out of range.
settings.title: Settings
settings.modules.title: Modules
settings.modules.subtitle: Switch parts of the platform on or off for this workspace.
settings.modules.hint: Disabling a module hides it everywhere but keeps its data; switching it back on restores everything.
settings.dashboard.title: Dashboard
settings.dashboard.subtitle: The default widget layout for everyone without a personal one.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.subtitle: Choose what reaches you, and when.
settings.notification_defaults.title: Notification defaults
settings.notification_defaults.subtitle: What everyone inherits before they change it themselves.
settings.dashboard.hint: Employees can still arrange their own dashboard; this template applies until they do.
settings.account.title: My account
settings.account.subtitle: Manage your language, appearance and profile.
settings.account.language_help: Choose the language for your interface. It's saved to your account and follows you across devices.
settings.account.appearance_help: Choose light or dark, or match your device's setting.
settings.account.email_help: Your email is used to sign in and can't be changed here.
settings.branding.domain.title: Custom domain
settings.branding.domain.subtitle: Serve this organization on your own domain. You prove control via a DNS TXT record before it becomes active.
settings.branding.domain.verified_now: Domain verified — it now resolves to this organization.
settings.branding.domain.txt_instruction: Create this DNS TXT record, wait for it to propagate, then verify:
settings.custom_fields.title: Custom fields
settings.custom_fields.subtitle: Define your own typed fields on companies, contacts and more.
settings.custom_fields.empty: No custom fields for this entity type yet.
settings.custom_fields.label: Label
settings.custom_fields.key_hint: Lowercase, letters/digits/underscores. Cannot be changed later.
settings.custom_fields.key_locked: The key is fixed after creation.
settings.custom_fields.type_locked: The type is fixed after creation.
settings.custom_fields.label_optional: Labels are optional — the key is shown when a label is empty.
settings.custom_fields.delete_confirm: Delete this custom field? Stored values for it are lost.
settings.branding.title: Branding
settings.branding.subtitle: Your logo, colors and brand name — applied across the whole app.
settings.branding.show_brand_name: Show the brand name next to the logo
settings.branding.hint: Changes apply on the next page load, for everyone in this workspace.
settings.task_templates.title: Task templates
settings.task_templates.subtitle: Reusable task lists, e.g. client onboarding — applied manually or on a status change.
settings.task_labels.title: Task labels
settings.task_labels.subtitle: Colored labels to organize tasks across clients and projects.
settings.task_labels.delete_confirm: Delete this label? It is removed from all tasks.
settings.users.title: Team & users
settings.users.subtitle: Invite colleagues, set their role, or revoke access.
settings.users.name: Name
settings.users.invited_hint: New users set a password via “Forgot password”.
settings.leave.title: Leave
settings.leave.subtitle: Leave types, the default work schedule, public holidays and yearly entitlements
settings.leave.schedule_hint: The week every employee without their own schedule works. Change someone's own schedule under Settings → Users.
settings.leave.holidays_hint: A holiday on a scheduled working day costs no leave hours. Not every holiday is a day off everywhere — switch off the ones you work.
settings.leave.holidays_empty: No holidays for this year yet.
settings.leave.imported: {created} added, {updated} moved, {skipped} left as they were.
settings.leave.holiday_delete_confirm: Delete this holiday? Deactivating it keeps it out of every calculation and survives the next import.
settings.leave.contract_hours_derived: Contract hours follow from the employee's work schedule.
settings.leave.delete_confirm: Delete this leave type? Types with requests can only be deactivated.
settings.leave.generate_hint: Creates missing entitlements from each type's default weeks × contract hours
settings.system.title: System information
settings.system.subtitle: Version, updates and the health of this installation.
settings.system.unavailable: Could not read the system information.
settings.system.dev_build: Development build — not a released image.
settings.system.migrations_up_to_date: The database schema is up to date.
settings.system.migrations_pending: Migrations are pending — the schema is behind this release.
settings.system.up_to_date: You are running the latest release.
settings.system.update_disabled: The update check is switched off.
settings.system.update_disabled_help: Set SCHAKL_UPDATE_CHECK_ENABLED=true to switch it back on.
settings.system.update_dev_build: Update checks are skipped on a development build.
settings.system.diagnostics_help: Copy this into a bug report.
errors.invalid_sort: You can't sort by that column.
errors.forbidden: You don't have access to this.
errors.approved_locked: These hours are approved and locked. A manager can change or unapprove them.
errors.due_reason_required: Give a reason for moving the deadline.
errors.last_owner: You can't remove or demote the last owner.
errors.last_role_manager: This is the last role that can manage roles — the organisation would lock itself out.
errors.system_role_immutable: This is a system role: its key cannot change, it cannot be deleted, and the owner role's permissions are fixed.
errors.system_role_required: Every user must keep at least one system role (owner, administrator, member or client).
errors.cannot_remove_self: You can't remove your own membership.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.leave_overlap: This period overlaps another leave request.
errors.leave_insufficient_balance: Not enough leave balance for this request.
errors.leave_decided: This request has already been decided.
errors.leave_type_in_use: This leave type is in use and can only be deactivated.
errors.leave_end_before_start: The end date is before the start date.
errors.leave_no_working_hours: This period contains no scheduled working hours.
errors.leave_end_time_before_start: The end time is not after the start time.
errors.leave_holiday_exists: There is already a holiday on that date.
errors.leave_schedule_day_invalid: The end of the working day is not after its start.
errors.leave_schedule_break_invalid: The end of the break is not after its start.
errors.leave_schedule_break_outside: A break must fall inside the working day.
errors.leave_schedule_breaks_overlap: Breaks may not overlap each other.
errors.leave_schedule_day_empty: The breaks take up the whole working day.
errors.leave_schedule_empty: Pick at least one working day.
errors.invalid_assignee: That employee is not a member of this workspace.
errors.multiple_primary_assignees: Only one assignee can be the responsible one.
errors.unknown_host: Unknown address: no organization is served on this hostname.
errors.setup_already_done: This installation is already set up.
errors.slug_taken: This slug is already in use.
errors.invalid_slug: Not a valid slug (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; some names are reserved).
errors.invalid_domain: Not a valid domain, or the domain is served by this installation itself.
errors.domain_taken: This domain is already claimed by another organization.
errors.domain_verification_failed: Verification failed: the DNS TXT record was not found (yet).
errors.export_required: Export the organization's data first — destruction requires an export taken after deletion.
errors.org_not_deleted: Delete the organization first before destroying it permanently.
errors.confirm_slug: The confirmation does not match the slug.
errors.import_invalid: This is not a valid export file.
errors.import_schema_mismatch: The export comes from a different application version. Align versions first, then retry.
setup.title: Set up your installation
setup.subtitle: One step and you're live: create your organization and the owner account.
setup.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens. Part of your address and hard to change later.
setup.modules_hint: What this installation is used for — change any time under Settings.
setup.owner_hint: This account manages the organization and this installation.
instance.title: Instance
instance.subtitle: Organizations on this installation — lifecycle, modules and data.
instance.owner_email_hint: Gets the owner role; sets a password via password reset.
instance.reslug_hint: Changing the slug changes the organization's address.
instance.impersonate_hint: Time-boxed, audited, and visible to everyone via a banner.
instance.import_hint: Paste the JSON of a previously exported organization. Domains are not carried over and must be verified again.
instance.suspend_confirm: Suspend {name}? Members can no longer sign in until reactivation.
instance.soft_delete_confirm: Delete {name}? The organization stops resolving but its data is kept until it is destroyed permanently.
instance.purge_hint: Removes every row of this organization. Requires an export taken after deletion — that export is the only copy that remains.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.bell.title: Notifications
notifications.event.time.entry_approved: approved {hours} h of your logged time
notifications.event.time.timesheet_remin: Your timesheet for the week of {week_start} is still empty
notifications.activity.title: Activity
notifications.settings.override_count: {count} of these are your own settings; the rest are inherited.
notifications.settings.due_soon_hint: How many days before a deadline counts as “due soon”.
notifications.settings.quiet_hint: Saved, but not applied yet: in-app notifications never interrupt, so quiet hours only take effect once email and chat delivery arrive.
notifications.event_label.task.assigned: A task is assigned to me
notifications.event_label.task.unassigne: A task is taken away from me
notifications.event_label.project.assign: I am added to a project
notifications.event_label.project.budget: A project runs through its budget
notifications.event_label.company.assign: I am added to a client
permissions.notifications.notification.w: Mark notifications read and set own preferences
permissions.settings.domain.write: Claim and verify a custom domain
permissions.tasks.template.apply: Apply a task template to a client
permissions.time.report.read: View the hours overview and reports
settings.roles.title: Roles
settings.roles.subtitle: Define who may do what. A user's permissions are the union of every role they hold.
settings.roles.key_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, - and _. It cannot be changed later.
settings.roles.system_hint: A system role cannot be deleted and its key never changes, but its permissions are yours to set.
settings.roles.owner_locked: The owner always holds every permission. That is what keeps a mistake made elsewhere fixable.
settings.roles.delete_confirm: Delete this role? Everyone who holds it loses its permissions.
settings.users.system_role_hint: Everyone keeps at least one system role this release.
settings.users.schedule_inherited_hint: This employee works the default schedule of {hours} h a week.
settings.users.schedule_stale_hours: Contract hours are {hours} h/week, but this person has no schedule of their own — leave is measured against the {inherited} h default.
